title: Croparium: Mekanism
description: Turn Mekanism minerals into farmable crops—harvest them the agricultural way!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cabbf0896a490a79be23922183406cfa88d2d0d0.png)

Dependencies: [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) and [**Mekanism**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)

This mod adds farming functionality for 10 types of minerals and materials from Mekanism, allowing players to obtain these resources through agricultural means.

Different crops have specific planting conditions: most crops need to be planted on Overworld Farmland, while the two crops—Mekanism Refined Glowstone Crop and Mekanism Refined Obsidian Crop—require Tough Ore Farmland.

**How to Reclaim Farmland**

_Overworld Farmland_

Hold any pickaxe in your main hand and right-click common Overworld stones (e.g., regular Stone, Deepslate, and Cobblestone variants) to convert them into usable farmland. This farmland needs a water source within a 4-block horizontal radius.

_Tough Farmland_

Hold a Diamond Pickaxe or Netherite Pickaxe in your main hand and right-click Obsidian, Crying Obsidian, or Deadrock (a series of stones from the Twilight Forest mod) to convert them. This farmland requires a lava source within a 4-block horizontal radius to support crop growth.

For details on how to obtain seeds, as well as specific information about crop planting and growth processes, please refer to [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) mod for more instructions.

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8af2570b06d480266a12355be354c6d58de0c08.png)
